MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-14-2002 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Settlement conference assigned to Department 303, Judge: Douglas C. Munson; Clerk: David Swanson; Reporter: Mary Hinds #2011. Gary Chen appeared on behalf of Plaintiff and Defendant appeared in pro per. Settlement conference held. Case settled on the record. Defendant will vacate 4320 Judah Street #5 by 4/20/02 and return keys. Plaintiff will waive rents owed and will keep $750 deposit. Trial date of 3/18/02 vacated.
